title: run: clear default seccomp filter if not enabled
body: When seccomp is not enabled, make sure to clear any default setting which runtime-tools might have supplied for us.  Likewise, if SELinux is not enabled, don't set a process label or a mount label.

comments.body: The changes LGTM, not quite sure what's up with the build.  The return value thing is just a warning, shouldn't have held stuff up.
